title: Fixture bug issue
body:
## Summary

Parser loses a required field.

## Observed behavior

The parser omits the required field.

## Expected behavior

The parser retains every required field.

## Reproduction or evidence

Use the fixture body.

## Impact

Blocked promotion prevents reliable work.

## Fix scope

- Preserve required fields.

## Non-goals

- Do not redesign the form.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The required field is present.

## Dependencies

None.

## Relevant project documents

- `docs/project.md`

## Readiness

- [x] The incorrect and expected behaviors are clear.
- [x] Reproduction or evidence is sufficient to validate the fix.
- [x] Fix scope and non-goals are explicit.
- [x] Acceptance criteria are observable and reviewable.
- [x] Dependencies are satisfied or explicitly handled.
- [x] Relevant project documents are identified.
- [x] The fix is small enough for one implementation slice.
